selectedVideoModel.reason: Best low-resolution production default for this pass because it is studio-grade lip sync at much lower rate than Creatify Aurora, Sync 3, Veed Fabric, HeyGen Avatar 4, and OmniHuman 1.5.
selectedVideoModel.cheapProofOnly: Veed Lipsync at 41/s is for throwaway mouth-timing proof only, not client-ready visual review.
selectedVideoModel.fallbackForMoreUGCExpression: Creatify Aurora at 848/s if Sync Lipsync 2 Pro is too stiff after the mouth sync is approved.
selectedVideoModel.finalEscalation: OmniHuman 1.5 at 1267/s only if body performance becomes more important after continuity and lip sync pass.

approvedMusicBed.title: Afro House Candidate 3 — Afro Soul Chant
approvedMusicBed.mixDirection: Use as the selected background music bed. Keep it low under dialogue, with the deep magnetic recumbent-bike whir tucked underneath. Dialogue stays dry, clear, and dominant.

currentVisualReview.purpose: Absolute production continuity lock for the fixed-world, pedal-visible parallel recumbent-bike over-the-shoulder reverse-angle template before producing video shots.
currentVisualReview.cacheRule: Use immutable timestamped filenames for review renders. Do not point the public sandbox at overwritten stable filenames for current-stage media.
absoluteContinuityLock: Only two characters exist in the whole shoot: Character A and Character B.
Character A must keep the exact face, brunette ponytail, age read, body type, makeup, skin tone, and darker mocha/taupe outfit from final-character-a-dark-taupe-20260616-220447.webp.

Character B must keep the exact face, blonde beach-wave hair, blue-eye read, age read, body type, makeup, skin tone, and sand/taupe outfit with muted teal accent from final-character-b-teal-accent-20260616-220447.webp.
Every Character A speaking shot must derive from fixed-world-open-recumbent-camera-a-lock-20260617-005258.png with only minor crop differences.
Every Character B speaking shot must derive from fixed-world-open-recumbent-camera-b-matched-bike-lock-20260617-010220.png with only minor crop differences.

Seat and bike assignment is locked: Character A is always Character A on Bike A in the same assigned seat/side for every scene, and Character B is always Character B on Bike B in the same assigned seat/side for every scene.

Bike A and Bike B are the same exact sleek 2026 premium recumbent bike model with identical black satin aerodynamic frame, reclined black seat/backrest, compact rider-facing touchscreen console, small stabilizing bar under or near the console only if mechanically plausible, side/base handles beside the seat, vented flywheel housing, crank/pedal placement, foot straps, rail/base construction, and mechanical proportions.
The front cockpit stays open with room for natural hand movement; do not add large upright-style handlebars or a bulky handlebar tower in front of the riders.
The bikes must make logical mechanical sense and never change style, console, frame, pedals, crank path, seat, side/base handles, flywheel housing, or open-front cockpit from frame to frame.

Each rider's left foot and right foot must stay on the correct left/right pedals of her own assigned bike with no crossed legs, no foot crossing the bike centerline, no foot on the opposite-side pedal, and no left/right pedal confusion.
Do not switch seats, do not switch bikes, do not swap sides, do not trade places, and do not reposition either woman between scenes.
Do not redesign either character scene to scene. Do not change faces, hair, makeup, outfits, wardrobe colors, body type, ethnicity, age, accessories, bike model, lighting, or gym layout.

Allowed variation only: dialogue lip movement, natural eye contact with the other woman, continuous visible pedaling by both women unless the scene explicitly shows a dismount, plus subtle shoulder/body rhythm, relaxed breath shifts, tiny natural hand gestures below the face line, and very small crop adjustments.

Small expressive body language and hand movement is allowed only when it never blocks the mouth, never crosses the face, never distracts from the active speaker's lip track, and never causes lip-sync drift. Perfect lip sync is the priority over acting.
No new characters, no background pedestrians, no wardrobe alternates, no camera-to-camera presenter energy, and no direct-to-lens CTA delivery.
cameraTemplate: Both recumbent bikes stay side-by-side, parallel, and facing the same direction.
Fixed-world map: Character B is on Bike B, the left/near bike, and Character A is on Bike A, the right/far bike.

Bike A and Bike B must remain visually identical, sleek, modern, mechanically plausible 2026 premium recumbent bikes in both Camera A and Camera B, with open front space, compact touchscreen consoles, and side/base handles rather than bulky front handlebars.
Character A remains on Character A's assigned Bike A and Character B remains on Character B's assigned Bike B for the entire shoot.
The women never switch seats, bikes, sides, positions, or places.
Camera A looks over Character B's blurred blonde shoulder/hair toward Character A speaking.
Camera B looks over Character A's blurred brunette shoulder/ponytail toward Character B speaking.
The active speaker turns toward the other woman, not toward the camera.
The foreground listener's face and mouth are not visible.

Continuous visible pedaling by both women is required in every bike shot unless the shot explicitly shows a dismount. Natural gestures are allowed only below the face line and away from the mouth; hands must not cover lips, chin, cheeks, jawline, or face-tracking area.
Repeat the same two camera angles across all dialogue scenes with only minor crop differences.
requirements: Character A wears darker mocha/taupe high-end logo-free athleisure.
Character B wears sand/taupe high-end logo-free athleisure with muted teal accent to complement blonde hair and blue eyes.
Character B wardrobe must not be stark white, cream, underwear-like, lingerie-like, bra-only, or see-through.
Both recumbent bikes must be the same premium black model with matching black upholstery and matching frame design.
Each woman must stay on her own same assigned bike and seat across every scene.
Wealthy, organized, well put together, believable busy moms training at an Equinox-inspired Newport Beach fitness club.
